shared_attributes.purpose: collision targets that trigger game over

context.role: Flying obstacle requiring duck to avoid
context.screen_position: y=50px (ground + 50px), scrolls from right to left
context.usage_scenario: Appears after 200+ points, spawn probability 30-40%, requires ducking to avoid collision

visual_specification.shape: Pteranodon with outstretched wings and long beak

animation.description: Wing flapping - Frame 1: wings up position, Frame 2: wings down position, seamless loop at 10 FPS

visual_specification.details: Long pointed beak, outstretched wings, flying pose, alternating wing positions for flight animation

relationships.shared_with: Same sprite and animation as pterodactyl_high, only y-position differs
relationships.differences_from: pterodactyl_high flies at y=80px, pterodactyl_low at y=50px; cacti are ground-based static obstacles

explicit_negations: No additional flight effects or trails
